'''Sterns Yennich''' was a [[Private/Legends|private]] and a [[GeNode]], and for a brief time, a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]]. A member of [[Janzor]]'s [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]], at the start of the [[Battle of Kashyyyk (19 BBY)|Imperial occupation of Kashyyyk]], he was dispatched to the surface. Yennich, [[Wayson Dower]], and [[Milo Strander]] were the only Stormtroopers to survive the battle and they fled within a tree. There, he was impaled and dragged underground by an immense spider. He was the last casualty of the battle.<ref name="Pax Empirica" />
